message:
chore(beads): close frankenpandas-fd90.21

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -451,7 +451,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.19","title":"test(readme): functional coverage for fd90.16 helpers (DateRangeError/TimedeltaRangeError, cast_scalar_owned, read_csv_with_index_cols)","description":"Self-review of fd90.16 (commit c70c018) caught the same gap pattern as fd90.17/fd90.18: the bead promoted 5 paired helpers to the prelude with a compile-only guard. Nothing exercises them functionally.

Plan: add readme_paired_helpers_round_trip:
- Trigger TimedeltaRangeError::InsufficientParams via timedelta_range(None, None, None, ...)
- Trigger DateRangeError via insufficient params
- cast_scalar_owned: move-input cast vs cast_scalar borrow path on the same value
- read_csv_with_index_cols: parse a CSV and promote a column to the index","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:16:37.314206548Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:18:22.868749036Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T12:18:22.866707149Z","close_reason":"completed: functional integration test for fd90.16 helpers","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.19","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:16:37.314206548Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","title":"fp-io read_sql_table chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse the table-name validation/escaping path, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for batching and invalid chunksize/table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.683429602Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.681545888Z","close_reason":"Completed in 693dc14","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.20","title":"test(readme): functional coverage for SqlQueryResult + SqlIndexedChunkIterator","description":"Self-review of fd90.13 found 2 SQL types whose surface is in prelude but not functionally exercised end-to-end (the other 7 fd90.13 types are produced by SqlInspector methods which are tested in fd90.9-12):

- SqlQueryResult — return type of SqlConnection::query(sql, params)
- SqlIndexedChunkIterator — return type of read_sql_chunks_with_index_col / etc.

Plan: extend readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite to:
- Call conn.query(...) directly and inspect SqlQueryResult.columns + .rows
- Call read_sql_chunks_with_index_col (or simplest variant) and verify SqlIndexedChunkIterator yields expected chunks","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:19:27.247170864Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:23:49.159120517Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T12:23:49.155060457Z","close_reason":"completed: SqlQueryResult + SqlIndexedChunkIterator covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.20","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:19:27.247170864Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.21","title":"test(readme): IPC stream round-trip (read_ipc_stream_bytes / write_ipc_stream_bytes)","description":"README §147 IO Format Support documents Arrow IPC stream as a first-class IO format with read_ipc_stream_bytes / write_ipc_stream_bytes. README line 150 specifically calls out that 'The Arrow IPC stream format is reachable through the standalone read_ipc_stream_bytes / write_ipc_stream_bytes functions — no extension method is exposed for it on DataFrameIoExt'.

Both functions are in the prelude (and have been since fd90.125) but have zero integration test coverage. Adding a round-trip test reachable via the prelude alone:

- Build a DataFrame
- write_ipc_stream_bytes(&df) → Vec<u8>
- read_ipc_stream_bytes(&bytes) → DataFrame
- Assert shape + values survive the trip","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:25:11.713926673Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:25:47.135773481Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.21","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:25:11.713926673Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.21","title":"test(readme): IPC stream round-trip (read_ipc_stream_bytes / write_ipc_stream_bytes)","description":"README §147 IO Format Support documents Arrow IPC stream as a first-class IO format with read_ipc_stream_bytes / write_ipc_stream_bytes. README line 150 specifically calls out that 'The Arrow IPC stream format is reachable through the standalone read_ipc_stream_bytes / write_ipc_stream_bytes functions — no extension method is exposed for it on DataFrameIoExt'.

Both functions are in the prelude (and have been since fd90.125) but have zero integration test coverage. Adding a round-trip test reachable via the prelude alone:

- Build a DataFrame
- write_ipc_stream_bytes(&df) → Vec<u8>
- read_ipc_stream_bytes(&bytes) → DataFrame
- Assert shape + values survive the trip","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:25:11.713926673Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:26:52.721836941Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T12:26:52.719862772Z","close_reason":"completed: Arrow IPC stream round-trip covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.21","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:25:11.713926673Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","title":"fp-io read_sql_table_columns chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., columns=[...], chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse table/column validation and projection query construction, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, zero chunksize, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.073612091Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.071766828Z","close_reason":"Completed in 03a4ce7","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","title":"fp-io SQL chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine pandas-style chunksize with index_col promotion. Cover read_sql/read_sql_query/read_sql_table chunk paths by wrapping SqlChunkIterator, preserving per-chunk RangeIndex when index_col is None and promoting/removing the named column when set. Add umbrella re-exports and focused fp-io tests for query chunks, table chunks, None behavior, and missing index_col errors.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.040272870Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.038384696Z","close_reason":"Completed in 90fd549","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","title":"fp-io SQL options chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine SqlReadOptions with index_col promotion for read_sql/read_sql_query paths. Reuse read_sql_chunks_with_options plus the indexed chunk wrapper, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for params/parse_dates/coerce_float with index_col, None behavior, and missing index_col validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.447171200Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.445331175Z","close_reason":"Completed in 48c06e1","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
